helmet.title: Check the Latest {{brokerName}} Rebate Schedule | FXPayout
helmet.description: FXPayout is a trusted forex rebate platform providing up to 90% cashback on broker commissions, paid directly to traders.

header.title: REBATE SCHEDULE
header.paragraph: Below is the {{brokerName}} rebate schedule under normal conditions. Please note that the schedule may experience delays due to certain factors such as server issues, system maintenance, payment gateway disruptions, or delays in receiving rebate data from the broker.

tableItems.schedule: Daily: One day after order closure, from 00:00 to 16:59 UTC (GMT+0).
Daily: One day after order closure, from 00:00 to 16:59 UTC (GMT+0).

tableItems.category: AutoRebate to Trading Account or Broker Wallet
AutoRebate from Rebate Balance to Bank / E-Currency
tableItems.schedule: Weekly: Every Monday to Wednesday at 16:59 UTC (GMT+0), provided the minimum payment threshold has been reached.
